## Webhook Endpoints

Webhooks called by PhoneBurner during dial sessions.

| Webhook | Trigger | Updates | Call Loggers |
|---|---|---|---|
| `server/public/webhooks/call_done.php` | PB `api_call_done` | session state, daily stats | close_call_logger.php,hs_call_logger.php,apollo_call_logger.php, |
| `server/public/webhooks/contact_displayed.php` | PB `api_contact_displayed` | session state | — |
